case_title: HAWKINS ALBERT D. VS ITT SHERATON CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HAWKINS ALBERT D. AS TO DEFENDANT ITT SHERATON CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
